message:
fix: enable stable Rust builds (#2)

- Remove unnecessary `const` from `codexbar_token_accounts_file()` which
  called non-const `dirs::home_dir()`, requiring nightly
- Upgrade rich_rust 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1, which drops `#![feature(let_chains)]`
  and works on stable Rust
- Update README requirements table to reflect stable toolchain support

Fixes #2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
